parsed.production_notes: The presenter's lip movements are poorly synced and his facial expressions have an uncanny, stiff quality typical of AI avatars. The audience in the foreground remains perfectly static throughout the video, which is unnatural for a live recording.

characters.appearance: A man in his 30s with a medium build and medium complexion. He has short, neatly styled dark hair and clean facial features. He appears energetic and expressive.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a white, knee-length kurta over a white lower garment. A light beige shawl is draped over his left shoulder. He has a dark watch on his left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Confident, motivational, and engaging, speaking directly to an audience with active hand gestures.

scenes.setting: A dimly lit room resembling a small auditorium. A dark blue backdrop is behind the presenter. An audience is seated in the foreground.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands on a small stage, holding a microphone in his right hand. He is gesturing with his left hand. Behind him is a solid dark blue backdrop. In the foreground, the backs of several seated people are visible, slightly out of focus, suggesting an audience. The lighting is warm and focused primarily on Character A.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter stands on a small stage, speaking passionately into a microphone while gesturing. The audience sits in the foreground, out of focus. A large blue banner is visible behind him. Text captions appear dynamically on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: English Seekho app তোমাকে শুধু সাত দিনে fluent ইংরেজি বলতে শেখাতে পারে। [English Seekho app can teach you to speak fluent English in just seven days.]
Character A says: বিশ্বাস হচ্ছে না? [Don't believe it?]
Character A says: আরে যখন বড় বড় ক্রিকেটাররা ইংরেজি বলতে পারে তাহলে তুমি কেন পারবে না? [Hey, when big cricketers can speak English, then why can't you?]
Character A says: শুধু একটা জিনিস মাথায় রেখো ছেড়ে দিলে চলবে না, একদম না। [Just keep one thing in mind, you can't give up, absolutely not.]
Character A says: রোজ একটু একটু সময় দাও। [Give it a little time every day.]
Character A says: আর English Seekho app দিয়ে practice করতে থাকো দেখবে নিজেরই change feel করছো। [And keep practicing with the English Seekho app, you will feel the change yourself.]
Character A says: আর শোনো, একটা কথা clear বলে দিই। [And listen, let me tell you one thing clearly.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
SEEKHO TALK
English Seekho app
তোমাকে শুধু সাত
দিনে fluently ইংরেজি বলতে
শেখাতে পারে।
বিশ্বাস হচ্ছে না?
আরে যখন বড় বড়
ক্রিকেটাররা ইংরেজি
বলতে পারে তাহলে
তুমি কেন পারবে না? শুধু
একটা জিনিস মাথায়
রেখো ছেড়ে দিলে চলবে
না, একদম না। রোজ
একটু একটু সময় দাও।
আর English Seekho
app দিয়ে practice
করতে থাকো দেখবে
নিজেরই change feel
করছো। আর শোনো, একটা
কথা clear বলে দিই।

scenes.setting: A brightly lit living room during the daytime.

panels.panel_visual_description: Two hands hold a smartphone vertically in the center of the frame. The background shows a brightly lit room with a window covered by patterned curtains. A brown plastic chair sits near the window. To the right, a television rests on a wooden stand. The hands are holding the phone as if viewing content.

scenes.visual_description: A pair of hands holds a smartphone in portrait mode. The background shows a typical Indian living room with a window, a plastic chair, and a television. The phone screen displays a social media feed being scrolled. Text captions overlay the bottom of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: তুমি যেটা ভাবছো Instagram scroll করে YouTube দেখে সব শিখে যাবে এটা পুরোটা একটা ভ্রম। [What you are thinking, that you will learn everything by scrolling Instagram and watching YouTube, this is entirely an illusion.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
তুমি যেটা ভাবছো
Instagram scroll করে
YouTube দেখে সব
শিখে যাবে এটা পুরোটা
একটা ভ্রম।

scenes.setting: A dimly lit room resembling a small auditorium. A dark blue backdrop is behind the presenter. An audience is seated in the foreground.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands on a small stage, holding a microphone in his right hand. He is gesturing with his left hand. Behind him is a solid dark blue backdrop. In the foreground, the backs of several seated people are visible, slightly out of focus, suggesting an audience. The lighting is warm and focused primarily on Character A.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter continues his speech, looking directly at the camera. He uses hand gestures to emphasize his points. The setting remains the same with the blurred audience and the blue banner. Text captions continue to appear dynamically.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: সত্যি কথা বলতে গেলে বেশিরভাগ YouTuber তোমাকে শেখাচ্ছে না। [To tell the truth, most YouTubers are not teaching you.]
Character A says: ওরা শুধু views আর likes এর জন্য content বানাচ্ছে। [They are just making content for views and likes.]
Character A says: তাই যদি সত্যি সত্যি ইংরেজি বলতে শিখতে চাও তাহলে ঘুরে বেড়ানোর দরকার নেই। [So if you really want to learn to speak English, then there is no need to wander around.]
Character A says: আজ থেকেই English Seekho app ব্যবহার করা শুরু করে দাও। [Start using the English Seekho app from today itself.]
Character A says: রোজ একটু করে পরিশ্রম করো। [Work hard a little every day.]
Character A says: নিজেকে আরও better করো। [Make yourself better.]
Character A says: আর একদিন নিজের পায়ে দাঁড়িয়ে বলে দিতে পারো হ্যাঁ, আমি পারি। [And one day you can stand on your own feet and say yes, I can.]
Character A says: এখনই দেরি না করে install now-এ click করো আর English Seekho app download করে নাও। [Without delaying any further, click on install now and download the English Seekho app.]

scenes.visual_description: A solid black screen with a large block of white disclaimer text.
scenes.on_screen_text: English Seekho kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
